name: testops-companion
description: A comprehensive test automation management platform

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend && npm audit fix
scripts.setup:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm audit fix
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm audit fix
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.security:audit: npm audit && cd frontend && npm audit && cd ../backend && npm audit
scripts.security:fix: npm audit fix && cd frontend && npm audit fix && cd ../backend && npm audit fix

author: Rotem Ayalon
